channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Magnificent Seven’ stocks rise — but hardly enough to reverse a brutal February
item.description: A violent rotation away from Big Tech stocks this year could hobble the S&P 500.

item.title: ‘I won’t take out a loan’: I need $18K in house repairs. Do I take it from my Roth, 401(k) or IRA?
item.description: “I plan to be debt-free in less than two years.”

item.title: Christian Bale’s $22 million California foster care village is taking shape
item.description: Actor Christian Bale’s $22 million foster care village is on track to be completed this year, bringing to fruition the on-screen star’s 17-year dream ...

item.title: What oil hitting $70 a barrel would signal about rising U.S.-Iran tensions
item.description: It looks unlikely that the U.S. would try destroying Iranian oil infrastructure because the Trump administration has talked about bringing energy pric...

item.title: Fund that has frozen withdrawals since November now says it’ll never open up
item.description: A $1.6 billion fund at the center of concerns over private debt is now abandoning plans to let investors withdraw their money.

item.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The major averages managed to post gains on Wednesday as tech shares rose. It was the third straight positive day for the S&P 500.

item.title: Hedge funds have a clear favorite Magnificent 7 stock, attracting the likes of Ackman, Druckenmiller and Klarman
item.description: Notable institutional investors bought a net 40.9 million shares in the cloud provider in the fourth quarter, according to a CNBC analysis of data fro...

item.title: Inside David Einhorn's eclectic stock portfolio: The value investor shuns AI in favor of a unique mix of companies
item.description: Einhorn's latest moves reflect his views on artificial intelligence and the market as a whole.

item.title: Searching software for value as shares get pummeled. UBS found four stocks it likes
item.description: As software stocks are battered amid the artificial intelligence threat, UBS likes HubSpot, Microsoft, ServiceNow and Autodesk.

item.title: Gold and silver have been on a wild ride. How you can add exposure to the metals in your portfolio
item.description: The metals have had a solid rally to kick off 2026, but a closer look reveals plenty of dramatic swings in prices from one day to the next.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
